reports.headline: ACTION-PACKED DAY: 4 MATCHES, 19 KOS!
reports.report:
What a day at the Smash Arena! We witnessed 4 intense matches with a combined 19 knockouts.

will was the workhorse of the day, grinding through 3 matches with 2 victories.

The hottest player was will who maintained an impressive 66.7% win rate.

We even saw perfection today - will delivered a flawless 3-0 with INCINEROAR!

The arena awaits more battles tomorrow. Who will rise to the top?
